title: Assistant ESD Consultant
description:
Driven by Singapore Sustainability Roadmap and the global demand in sustainability, our team is expanding, and we are looking for candidates who expressed interest in the built environment to provide advisory to stakeholders and lead project team to attain their sustainable goals and visions.

We are seeking a dedicated and knowledgeable Green Building Consultant to join our team. As a Green Building Consultant, you will be responsible for guiding clients in adopting sustainable and environmentally friendly building practices. You will provide expertise on green building certifications, energy efficiency, and eco-friendly materials, helping clients design and construct buildings that minimize their environmental impact.

Responsibilities:

  1. Support in Green Certifications: Assist in preparing documentation and calculations for green certifications such as Green Mark, LEED, WELL, and Wired score. Coordinate with clients and consultants to gather necessary data for submissions
  2. Data Collection and Analysis: Perform basic analyses on energy efficiency, lighting, HVAC systems and other feasibility
  3. Technical Support: Provide technical support in preparing energy efficiency and sustainability reports. Review technical drawings and specifications for alignment with sustainability goals
  4. Project Management Assistance: Track project timelines and ensure milestone are met for deliverables. Attend project meetings and prepare minutes, ensuring follow-ups on assigned tasks

Communicate with architects, engineers, contractors, and clients to align project goals

Represent the ESD team in discussions about sustainability initiatives

  1. Documentation and Reporting: Maintain organized records for all sustainability-related documentation
  2. Ad-hoc Tasks: Assist with additional tasks as directed by senior ESD engineers or management
  3. Continuous Learning: Stay up-to-date with the latest trends, technologies, and advancements in green building practices. Continuously enhance expertise through training and professional development.

Qualifications:

  • Minimum Diploma in Engineering, Sustainability, or related field.
  • Professional certification such as LEED AP/ WELL AP/ GMAP/ GMAAP is commendable, but not compulsory
  • Strong communication and presentation skills.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
  • Good working attitude

Benefits:

  • Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses.
  • Health, and dental insurance reimbursement
  • Professional development opportunities and training programs.
  • Positive and inclusive work environment.
  • Work-life balance
  • Opportunities for career advancement and growth.

Immediate vacancies available. We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
